light_pollution.scope: city-scale (Aleppo), not point-specific to the mosque
light_pollution.finding: NASA Earth Observatory VIIRS Day/Night Band composites (2012 vs 2016) show Aleppo among the most dramatic nighttime-light losses in the Middle East during the conflict; a cited 2015 Voice of America estimate put Syria-wide light loss at up to 80%.
light_pollution.credit: NASA Earth Observatory imagery by Joshua Stevens, using Suomi NPP VIIRS data from Miguel Roman, NASA GSFC
